Subject.title: Subject
Subject.description: A container for flashcards belonging to a specific topic.

name.description: The name of the subject (e.g., History, Physics).

userId.description: The UID of the user who created this subject.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the subject was created.

Deck.title: Deck
Deck.description: A group of flashcards within a subject.

subjectId.description: The ID of the subject this deck belongs to.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the deck was created.

Flashcard.title: Flashcard
Flashcard.description: A single flashcard with a front (question) and back (answer).

front.description: The question or prompt on the front of the card.

back.description: The answer or explanation on the back of the card.

deckId.description: The ID of the deck this flashcard belongs to.

subjectId.description: The ID of the subject this flashcard belongs to.

tags.description: A list of tags for categorization.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the flashcard was created.

/subjects/{subjectId}.description: Collection of subjects created by users.

/flashcards/{flashcardId}.description: Collection of flashcards created by users.
